title: <div>  •  Story Seeds: Generate match narratives using a template-based system (
content:
• Story Seeds: Generate match narratives using a template-based system (e.g., “[Player] outwitted [Opponent] in a daring Roman gambit”). Store in Firestore for chronicle integration.
Optimization:
• Use delta sync for multiplayer to reduce data usage.
• Cache profile and chronicle data locally for offline access.
• Limit chat to text/emotes to avoid moderation complexity.
Challenges to Mitigate:
• Ensure asynchronous play feels engaging with timely notifications.
• Test chronicle rendering for performance with long game histories.
6. System Architecture & Modular Scene Engine
Approach:
• Modular Scenes: Package each era as a Unity Addressable bundle (scene.json, assets, ruleset.cs, lore.md). Use AssetBundles for community themes.
• AI Middleware: Implement a lightweight state machine for game logic and hints, with optional cloud-based AI (e.g., AWS Lambda) for advanced features like Socratic dialogs.
• Backend: Use Firebase for user data, analytics, and multiplayer sync. Add GraphQL for efficient data queries.
• Community Toolkit: Provide a Unity Editor plugin for theme creation, with templates for scene.json and ruleset.cs. Host community themes on a moderated Firebase Storage bucket.
